query_normalized: testing hubble constant isotropy using pantheon supernova sample physics
rationale: The paper provides a foundational measurement of the Hubble constant using Type Ia supernovae, establishing baseline H₀ values from SN data (category (b) – it measures one of the user’s key variables, H₀, on the same supernova sample domain, and also serves as a canonical methodological reference for SN‑based H₀ studies).
